channel.title: Home on CoNime
channel.description: Recent content in Home on CoNime

item.title: About Us
item.description: About CoNime CoNime is an online news portal that delivers the latest updates on the world of anime and comics, especially for Indonesian readers. We are committed to providing up-to-date news, episode reviews, anime and manga recommendations, and other engaging content for fans. We are not an official website of any publisher or anime studio. All content is for informational purposes and aims to enrich the fan community. Our team consists of passionate writers and editors who love anime and comics.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Silakan hubungi kami melalui email: info@example.org atau isi formulir di bawah ini.

item.title: Disclaimer
item.description: CoNime Disclaimer CoNime is an informational portal covering anime and comics. We are not affiliated with any official content owners or trademarks mentioned. All images, videos, and excerpts are copyrights of their respective owners. Any leaks, predictions, or fan-made content are for entertainment purposes only and are not official references. We strive for accuracy but cannot guarantee all information is completely correct.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: CoNime Privacy Policy Your privacy is important to us. CoNime does not collect any personal data without your permission. If you contact us via a form, your information is only used for communication purposes. This website displays third-party advertisements, including Google AdSense, which may use cookies to serve relevant ads. You can disable cookies in your browser settings. By using this site, you agree to this privacy policy.

item.title: Terms of Service
item.description: CoNime Terms of Service By accessing CoNime , you agree to use the content responsibly and not for any illegal or harmful purposes. Copying or redistributing content from this site without permission is prohibited. We reserve the right to modify or terminate any part of the service without prior notice. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our website.
